pi_items.source: Verified from task instructions (task.json) which explicitly state this is the required domain name to configure.
Verified from task instructions (task.json) which explicitly state this is the required domain controller to configure.
Verified from task instructions (task.json) which explicitly instruct the user to ensure the 'Script Block Logging' option is enabled.

The environment setup script (install_adaudit_plus.ps1) dynamically determines the installation path, heavily prioritizing 'C:\Program Files\ManageEngine\ADAudit Plus' for the downloaded x64 installer.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly state to use the synthetic domain 'corp.acmefinancial.com' and domain controller 'DC01.corp.acmefinancial.com', and require enabling the 'Script Block Logging' feature. The PostgreSQL executable path claimed in metadata is contradicted by the environment setup script, which installs the 64-bit application to 'C:\Program Files\ManageEngine\ADAudit Plus'.
